query.description: Maximum number of records to return.
Number of records to skip for pagination.

Optional parameter to include additional information.
- `display` - Include display names for members. For users, the display value is resolved from the schema-configured display attribute (`systemAttributes.display`). Falls back to the user ID if no display attribute is configured, the configured attribute path does not exist in the user's data, or the attribute value is empty. For groups, the group name is used.

response.name: List of members in the group

Operations related to group management using hierarchical handle paths

item.name: List groups in organization unit specified by handle path

request.name: List groups in organization unit specified by handle path

query.description: Maximum number of records to return.
Number of records to skip for pagination.

variable.description:
(Required) Hierarchical path of organization unit handles separated by forward slashes.
Examples:
- `engineering` - Lists groups in the "engineering" OU
- `engineering/frontend` - Lists groups in "engineering/frontend"

response.name: List of groups in the organization unit

item.name: Create a new group under the organization unit specified by the handle path

request.name: Create a new group under the organization unit specified by the handle path

variable.description:
(Required) Hierarchical path of organization unit handles separated by forward slashes.
The new group will be created under the organization unit specified by this path.
Examples:
- `engineering` - Creates a new group under the "engineering" OU
- `engineering/frontend` - Creates a new group under "engineering/frontend"

(Required) Hierarchical path of organization unit handles separated by forward slashes.

- `engineering/frontend` - Creates a new group under "engineering/frontend"
